basics.name: Shankhanil Borthakur
basics.summary: Software Engineer 2 at JPMorgan Chase with expertise in cloud-based distributed systems, data engineering, and machine learning. Ranked 1 of 156 students in Electronics Engineering at NIT Surat with a 9.55/10 GPA. Published research in deep learning and object detection.

work.name: JPMorgan Chase
highlights: Developed a cloud-based distributed application that processes 5 million transactions daily, handles over 50,000 analytics queries per hour, and underpins a million-dollar annual trading business
Engineered a hot and cold data strategy using Query Federation to access recent data from high-performance Redshift storage and historical data from Amazon S3, slashing storage costs by 30%
Designed a database synchronization utility to ingest on-field survey data into a remote PostGIS database for real-time geospatial analytics, automating 95% of clients' manual workflow

work.name: JPMorgan Chase
highlights: Designed an Amazon Kinesis data pipeline to stream nearly 1 Terabyte of high-frequency trading data daily to Amazon Redshift
Enabled 4X operational scaling for one of the firm's fastest-growing trading divisions through on-prem to cloud transition

education.area: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication (Major), Computer Science (Minor)

publications.name: NER for Extracting Tourist Attractions from Textual Information: A BERT-BiLSTM-CRF Approach
publications.summary: Developed a Named Entity Recognition system using BERT and BiLSTM with CRF layer to extract tourist attractions from travel text data.

publications.name: Object Detection for Military Surveillance using YOLO Framework
publications.summary: Implemented YOLO-based object detection system for military surveillance applications with improved accuracy and real-time inference capabilities.

portfolio.name: Streak Fit - AI-Powered Virtual Group Fitness Platform
portfolio.description: Led a three-member team to develop a platform where users can exercise with their peers via video conferencing. Integrated pose detection model to monitor workout movements and provide real-time feedback.

portfolio.name: Q&A Made Easy - Real-Time Q&A Moderation System
portfolio.description: Developed a Chrome extension with built-in NLP filter to remove profane and repetitive questions during online meetings. Integrated speech-to-text support and admin dashboard for streamlined Q&A moderation.

portfolio.name: Travelo - Smart Travel Planning using NER
portfolio.description: Built a web application capable of automatically parsing lengthy travel blogs to extract tourist destinations and generate itineraries. Includes efficient route plotting on map.
